notes: Facts sourced from src/lib/holidays/country-hub-data.js's already-verified Syria observances section — Presidential Decree 188/2025 plus a General Secretariat of the Presidency communique (30 March 2026) confirming Orthodox Easter dates. No fresh web research needed.

core.type='orthodox-easter', easterOffset=0 — engine already implemented and proven live on sham-nessim (Egyptian Coptic Easter Monday equivalent, easterOffset:1); this is the Orthodox Easter Sunday/Good Friday itself, hence offset 0.
This was a genuine gap: country-hub-data.js's Syria observances entry had eventSlug: null despite the legal basis and confirming source already being verified in a prior session.
Strictly civic/legal register — no theological content, matching christmas-syria/revolution-day-syria/liberation-day-syria's neutral-record standard.
Single-country event (_countryCode: sy), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
relatedSlugs references christmas-syria (built just before this in the same batch, so it already exists at sync time).
